---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Yanhao Wang - Home"
---

<br>

<link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css" type="text/css">

<div style="text-align: center"><span style="color:Navy; font-size: 27pt; font-family:'Georgia'" ><b>Yanhao Wang</b></span> &nbsp;&nbsp; <span style="color:Black; font-size: 19pt; font-family:STFangsong" >王<b>彦皓</b></span> <a href="https://www.chinesenamesinenglish.com/wiki/Yanhao" style="color:rgb(128,139,150)"> /jen-haʊ/ </a></div>

<br>

<div><img src="images/KSB_YanhaoWang_2018Fall_compact.jpg" style="width: 270px; border:1px solid; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 50px" align="left"> 

Welcome to my website!

I'm a PhD candidate in [Business Economics and Public Policy](https://kelley.iu.edu/faculty-research/departments/business-economics-public-policy/index.cshtml) at [Kelley School of Business](https://kelley.iu.edu/), [Indiana University Bloomington](https://indiana.edu/).

I'm an applied microeconomist interested in health economics, industrial organization, and healthcare finance. My current research focuses on the behavior of healthcare providers and its implications on patient health and medical expenditure.

<span style="color:Navy">I'm on the 2023/24 job market.<span> 

[<button class="button-13" role="button">CV</button>](files/cv/CV_YanhaoWang.pdf)</div>
